why: FSC-2417 is blocked from production deployment due to failure in the development phase, with test coverage at 0% (below FCA threshold of 75–85%), and unresolved UAT defects preventing sign-off. Compliance Officer sign-off cannot proceed without remediation of these blockers. No-Go decision: production deployment is NOT approved until development phase passes, coverage thresholds are met, and UAT defects are resolved.
